creator: joneum@FreeBSD.org
text:
I've tested in a test jail:

 # make showconfig

[..]
HTTP_VIDEO_THUMBEXTRACTOR=off: 3rd party video_thumbextractor module
HTTP_ZIP=on: 3rd party http_zip module
ICONV=off: 3rd party iconv module
[..]


it build fine. With poudriere in 10.4, 11,1 and CURRENT, too.

Have you the same problems with nginx-devel?
